column1: # HC33 partition table — used by BOTH env:hc33 (HaLow) and
# env:hc33-standard-wifi.  Based on the board-correct Heltec table
# standard-wifi env used was a wrong guess from before we found this one.
# Owned in-repo so re-cloning ESP_HaLow can't clobber it.  Only change vs the
# stock Heltec table: user_data shrunk by 0x1000 (0x1E000 -> 0x1D000) to free
# 0x7EF000..0x7F0000 for a 4 KB `config` partition.  key_data (MM6108 license)
# and both app slots are untouched.  config_load.cpp finds this partition by
